title: Multiplayer Session Schema
description: Schema for validating multiplayer session state payloads.

session_id.description: Unique identifier for this multiplayer session.

mode_id.description: The multiplayer mode of this session.

authority_model.description: The authority model for this session.

content_pack_id.description: The ID of the content pack this session is associated with.

host_player_id.description: The player ID of the session host.

player_ids.description: List of player IDs participating in the session (1-4 players).

target_domain_state_id.description: The domain state ID targeted by this session, if applicable (e.g., for domain invasion).

session_state.description: Current state of the multiplayer session.

loot_policy.description: Policy governing loot distribution within the session.

risk_profile.description: Description of risks for different participants in the session.

safe_resolution_required.description: True if the session must always resolve to a safe, non-corrupted state.
